verificationNote: AI-generated risk methodology aligned to BNM RMiT requirements. Organizations should adapt to their specific risk appetite and board-approved frameworks.
title: Technology Risk Assessment Methodology
description: Structured methodology for assessing technology risks in Malaysian financial institutions, aligned to BNM RMiT Policy Document (November 2025).

levels.label: Rare
levels.description: May occur only in exceptional circumstances (<1% annual probability)

levels.label: Unlikely
levels.description: Could occur but not expected (1-10% annual probability)

levels.label: Possible
levels.description: Might occur at some time (10-50% annual probability)

levels.label: Likely
levels.description: Will probably occur in most circumstances (50-80% annual probability)

levels.label: Almost Certain
levels.description: Expected to occur in most circumstances (>80% annual probability)

levels.label: Insignificant
levels.description: Minimal disruption, no regulatory impact, <RM100K financial loss

levels.label: Minor
levels.description: Limited disruption, internal escalation only, RM100K-1M financial loss

levels.label: Moderate
levels.description: Significant disruption, potential BNM notification, RM1M-10M financial loss

levels.label: Major
levels.description: Severe disruption, BNM reporting required, RM10M-100M financial loss

levels.label: Critical
levels.description: Catastrophic impact, systemic risk, >RM100M financial loss or license threat

bands.label: High
bands.action: Mitigate within 30 days, escalate to CTRO

bands.label: Critical
bands.action: Immediate escalation to Board Risk Committee

reviewCycle: Quarterly, or upon material change in risk profile
approvalAuthority: Chief Technology Risk Officer (CTRO) or equivalent
